title: ferray-autodiff: no tests for mathematical singularities (sqrt(0), ln(0), tan(pi/2), asin(1))
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

No tests cover behavior at mathematical singularities where the derivative is infinite or undefined: sqrt(0) -> derivative is +inf, ln(0) -> derivative is +inf, tan(pi/2) -> undefined, asin(1) -> derivative is +inf, acosh(1) -> derivative is +inf, 1/0 -> derivative is -inf. These are precisely where forward-mode AD produces NaN/Inf silently. Add tests documenting the expected behavior (even if it's NaN/Inf).
